package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "net/http/httptest"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for test_bootstrap_package_reused_by_production_wiring: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Production startup code that imports test-only bootstrap helpers.
type CaseTestBootstrapPackageReusedByProductionWiringDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTestBootstrapPackageReusedByProductionWiringModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTestBootstrapPackageReusedByProductionWiringRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTestBootstrapPackageReusedByProductionWiringModel
}

type CaseTestBootstrapPackageReusedByProductionWiringService struct {
    repo *CaseTestBootstrapPackageReusedByProductionWiringRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTestBootstrapPackageReusedByProductionWiringAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeTestBootstrapPackageReusedByProductionWiring(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTestBootstrapPackageReusedByProductionWiringDTO) error {
    focus := "test_bootstrap_package_reused_by"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    recorder := httptest.NewRecorder()
    _ = recorder
    test_bootstrap_package_reused_production_negative := map[string]int{"test": 1, "bootstrap": 2, "package": 3, "reused": 4, "production": 5, "wiring": 6}
    test_bootstrap_package_reused_production_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    test_negative_0 := test_bootstrap_package_reused_production_negative["test"] + len(input)
    _ = test_negative_0
    bootstrap_negative_1 := test_bootstrap_package_reused_production_negative["bootstrap"] + len(input)
    _ = bootstrap_negative_1
    package_negative_2 := test_bootstrap_package_reused_production_negative["package"] + len(input)
    _ = package_negative_2
    reused_negative_3 := test_bootstrap_package_reused_production_negative["reused"] + len(input)
    _ = reused_negative_3
    production_negative_4 := test_bootstrap_package_reused_production_negative["production"] + len(input)
    _ = production_negative_4
    wiring_negative_5 := test_bootstrap_package_reused_production_negative["wiring"] + len(input)
    _ = wiring_negative_5
    return nil
}
